overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through the neon-lit Kabuki district of Night City. The player character navigates covered sidewalks, crosses a street with futuristic vehicles, ascends a concrete stairwell with blue fluorescent lighting, and traverses an elevated pedestrian corridor above the city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk with neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk beneath building overhang, approaching intersection

entered.detail: smooth concrete wall of adjacent building with green accent panels
gray concrete pavement with scattered litter and debris
large vertical neon sign with 'KABUKI' text glowing in red and white
tall modern street lamp with horizontal light fixture
green illuminated vending machine kiosk attached to building wall

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered urban sidewalk at night, with a concrete building wall on the left and the open street visible ahead. Neon signs illuminate the distance, including a prominent 'KABUKI' sign. The pavement shows scattered litter, and a few pedestrians are visible walking ahead.

events.description: exits covered sidewalk into open street intersection with crosswalk
approaches and enters stairwell structure beneath large billboard

agents.ego_description: crossing the asphalt road at crosswalk, navigating between vehicles and pedestrians to reach the stairwell entrance

notable_agents.action: white futuristic SUV driving through the intersection, headlights on

entered.detail: dark asphalt street surface with yellow and white painted lines
painted white zebra stripes marking pedestrian crossing
concrete entrance structure leading to underground or elevated walkway
large illuminated billboard displaying 'Osey!' with a face advertisement

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection at night, crossing the asphalt road marked with crosswalk lines. A white SUV passes by on the left as the character approaches a stairwell entrance beneath a large 'Osey!' billboard. The environment is fully exposed to the night sky with vibrant neon illumination from surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell with blue fluorescent lighting

events.description: enters enclosed stairwell with cool blue fluorescent lighting replacing outdoor neon
continues ascending concrete stairs following other pedestrians upward

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs in enclosed stairwell, following a pedestrian in distinctive purple pants

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing bright purple pants ascending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: gray concrete staircase with scattered magazines and litter on steps
smooth gray concrete walls with horizontal yellow safety stripes
cool blue-white fluorescent tube lights mounted on walls

segments.scene_description: Enclosed within a concrete stairwell with blue fluorescent lighting, the camera ascends the stairs following other pedestrians. The walls are bare concrete with yellow safety stripes, and the steps are littered with discarded magazines. The environment is completely indoor with no natural light or sky visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with city views

events.description: exits stairwell into elevated covered walkway with views of street below
approaching commercial area with vending machines and shop entrances

agents.ego_description: walking through elevated corridor, passing other pedestrians and overlooking the city street through openings

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians in matching blue and white uniforms walking ahead in the corridor

entered.detail: covered concrete pedestrian walkway with smooth flooring and overhead lighting
low concrete wall with metal railings overlooking the street below
view of the street and traffic visible through openings in the walkway wall
tall red and beige building facade visible from elevated position
palm tree visible through walkway opening
illuminated vending machine with 'REAL WATER' branding
opening to commercial shop area with various items and clutter visible

segments.scene_description: Walking through an elevated covered walkway with blue fluorescent ceiling lights, offering views of the city street below through openings in the concrete railing. Palm trees and a distinctive red building are visible outside. The corridor leads toward a commercial area with vending machines, including one for 'REAL WATER', and a shop entrance at the far end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit urban sidewalk through a sterile concrete stairwell and onto an elevated pedestrian corridor. It begins along a covered walkway beside a concrete wall, moving past scattered litter toward the glowing Kabuki signs of the city street. As the camera emerges from the cover, it crosses a wide asphalt intersection under a vibrant night sky and a large Osey billboard, passing a white SUV before entering a stairwell. The scene then shifts into a claustrophobic indoor environment, ascending concrete steps illuminated by blue fluorescent lights and marked with yellow safety stripes. Finally, the camera exits the stairs into an elevated walkway, where blue ceiling lights guide the way past views of palm trees and a red building toward a commercial area featuring water vending machines.
